intro.title: What is Beyblade X Resonance Quiz?
intro.description: Beyblade X Resonance Quiz is a personality quiz that matches you with your resonant Beyblade X. Through 12 carefully crafted questions, we analyze your tendencies across three core axes — Attack, Defense, and Stamina — then use a vector-based cosine distance algorithm to find the Beyblade that best resonates with your soul. With 144 Beyblade X products in our database, discover your true battle type and the Beyblade that fights alongside you.

howToPlay.title: How to Play
steps: Answer 12 personality questions — each option maps to Attack, Defense, or Stamina scores
Your scores are normalized into a unit vector representing your battle profile
We calculate the cosine distance between your vector and all 144 Beyblade stat vectors
Balance-type users receive priority matching with Balance-type Beyblades
Your top 3 matches are revealed with fit percentage and an awakening keyword
Share your results with friends and find out which Beyblade they resonate with!

attack.name: Attack
attack.desc: Aggressive, direct, high-impact — charges head-on with overwhelming force

defense.name: Defense
defense.desc: Calm, analytical, resilient — stands firm and turns opponents' power against them

stamina.name: Stamina
stamina.desc: Patient, enduring, strategic — outlasts the competition with steady persistence

balance.name: Balance
balance.desc: Versatile, adaptive, well-rounded — reads the battle and responds accordingly
